title: Annual total and leading-contributor share, 1989–2025
caption: Annual total against leading-contributor share, 1989–2025, with a logarithmic horizontal axis. The two move together (Spearman ρ = 0.82), but the spread around that tendency is wide. 1994 sits at 824,177 deaths and a 93.7% leading share.
alt_text: Scatter plot of all 37 years. The cloud slopes upward. 1990 and 2000 nearly overlap. 2013 and 2017 have similar totals but leading shares of 66.2% and 33.9%.
source: UCDP Organized Violence v26.1; ConflictLens calculations.
measure: Annual total and rank-1 contributor share
x_scale: logarithmic; full-period range is ×38.9 and 1994 is retained
notes: No fitted line: the correlation is reported in the caption to avoid causal framing.
background: transparent article canvas; preview composited on white
